since_last: 31% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.16%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.73% · BTC -1.05% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 31% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.16%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.16%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.09%
cards.body: Leaders: ZS +2.36%, CSCO +2.24%, PANW +2.16%, NET +1.92%, LEU +1.77%. Laggards: ISRG -12.09%, UPST -5.54%, SOUN -5.07%, AMAT -4.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.63% at $125.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
